description: Trigger + expectation evals for the AML/KYC Investigator persona. Highest cross-persona routing risk: 'AML flag' MUST NOT route to loan-council (BSA §5318(g)(2) tipping-off violation).

positive.prompt: Screen this borrower against BSA OFAC PATRIOT §326 CIP FinCEN CDD anchors
Is this beneficial owner disclosure compliant with 31 CFR 1010.230?
Suspicious activity threshold review for this transaction pattern
OFAC sanctions match for this counterparty
Tipping-off review — can we notify the borrower they were flagged?

negative.prompt: Draft adverse-action letter citing Reg B §1002.9(b)(2)
negative.reason: AA notification is compliance-officer scope not AML

negative.prompt: Compute VaR at 95% for concentration risk
Should we flag this loan for CRE cycle risk?

expectations.reason: BSA §5318(g)(2) prohibits disclosure of SAR filings
OFAC hits require human review + FinCEN 314(a) coordination
Every AML claim anchors to citation-registry entry (A1 defense)
FinCEN CDD 31 CFR 1010.230 beneficial-owner threshold is 25% ownership or single controlling person
